---
title: "Julia Chevan"
subtitle: "PT, DPT, PhD, MPH"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: images/JuliaChevan.png
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3044-4070
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/julia-chevan-78792ba/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jchevan
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jchevan@springfieldcollege.edu
---

Hi, I am Julia. I am a physical therapist, health services researcher, and public health professional with more than 30 years of experience at the intersection of academia, rehabilitation, implementation science, and chronic disease prevention. 

Currently I serve as Senior Program Manager with the [National Association of Chronic Disease Directors](https://chronicdisease.org). My day-to-day work focuses on building models for community-clinical partnerships that improve outcomes for people living with arthritis, fall risk, and other chronic conditions. In July 2026, I will be joining the [Clinical Research PhD Program](https://accelerated.uj.edu/academics/programs/clinical-research/) at the University of Jamestown as faculty.
